bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all two decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does AiDash operate in India?
faq.a: AiDash operates 1 active Global Capability Center site in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does AiDash have GCC centers in?
faq.a: AiDash's India GCC presence is in Bengaluru.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does AiDash run in India?
faq.a: AiDash runs CoE centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at AiDash's India GCCs?
faq.a: AiDash's India centers employ in the 101 to 200 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads AiDash's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 2 leaders at AiDash's India centers, across HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
